meta.summary: SyRI identifies synteny, structural rearrangements, local variants, and unaligned regions from whole-genome assembly alignments.
meta.description: SyRI identifies synteny, structural rearrangements, local variants, and unaligned regions from whole-genome assembly alignments.

test: python3 -c 'import syri, numpy, pandas, scipy, psutil, igraph, pysam, pulp, longestrunsubsequence; assert syri.__version__ == "1.7.1"'
command -v show-snps >/dev/null && command -v nucmer >/dev/null && minimap2 --version >/dev/null && samtools --version >/dev/null

rm -rf /tmp/taf-syri-smoke /tmp/taf-syri-smoke.log && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-syri-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-syri-smoke && printf '1\t240\t1\t240\t240\t240\t99.9\t1\t1\tChrA\tChrA\n' > coords.tsv && syri -c coords.tsv -F T --nosv --nosnp --novcf -k --prefix smoke. >/tmp/taf-syri-smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s smoke.synOut.txt && python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; lines = Path("smoke.synOut.txt").read_text().splitlines(); assert lines[0].startswith("#\tChrA\t1\t240\t"); assert lines[1] == "1\t240\t1\t240"' && rm -rf /tmp/taf-syri-smoke /tmp/taf-syri-smoke.log

rm -rf /tmp/taf-chroder-smoke && mkdir -p /tmp/taf-chroder-smoke && cd /tmp/taf-chroder-smoke && printf '1\t240\t1\t240\t240\t240\t99.9\t1\t1\tChrA\tChrA\n' > coords.tsv && python3 -c 'print(">ChrA"); print("ACGT" * 60)' > ref.fa && cp ref.fa qry.fa && chroder coords.tsv ref.fa qry.fa -F T -o smoke_chroder >/tmp/taf-chroder-smoke.log 2>&1 && test -s smoke_chroder.qry.fasta && test -s smoke_chroder.anno && rm -rf /tmp/taf-chroder-smoke /tmp/taf-chroder-smoke.log

upstream.name: SyRI
upstream.citation: Goel et al. 2019, SyRI: finding genomic rearrangements and local sequence differences from whole-genome assemblies
